name: 比例关系
subject: math
domain_name: 比率与比例 / Ratios & Proportions / Ratios & Proportions
curriculum_points: 6.RP.3 Use ratio and rate reasoning to solve real-world and mathematical problems, e.g., by reasoning about tables of equivalent ratios, tape diagrams, double number line diagrams, or equations.

6.RP.3.a Make tables of equivalent ratios relating quantities with whole-number measurements, find missing values in the tables, and plot the pairs of values on the coordinate plane. Use tables to compare ratios.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「比例关系」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：6.RP.3 Use ratio and rate reasoning to solve real-world and mathematical problems, e.g., by reasoning about tables of eq…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：6.RP.3.a Make tables of equivalent ratios relating quantities with whole-number … 对理解「比例关系」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
